## What does this PR do?

<!-- One clear sentence describing the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Model catalog update (`models.json`)
- [ ] Device compatibility update (`docs/DEVICES.md`)
- [ ] Translation / i18n
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## For model catalog PRs

- [ ] Model is GGUF format, downloadable from HuggingFace without login
- [ ] License allows free use — checked the model card
- [ ] Personally tested on a device with ≤8 GB RAM
- [ ] `min_ram_gb` values are from real observation, not estimated
- [ ] `"verified": true` only because I tested it myself

## For code PRs

- [ ] Tested in Termux or a Linux terminal
- [ ] No new dependencies added (standard library + `rich` only)
- [ ] Error messages are in plain language — no raw stack traces shown to users
- [ ] Functions stay under 40 lines where possible
